label: Prisoner interaction mode
description: Defines a prisoner interaction mode shown in the prisoner guest tab, including ordering and visibility gates for recruitment, release, execution, ideology, bloodfeeding, study, and interrogation modes.

listOrder.label: List order
listOrder.description: Sort order among prisoner interaction modes in the UI. Lower values appear earlier.

allowOnWildMan.label: Allow on wild man
allowOnWildMan.description: If true, this interaction mode is available for wild men (non-humanlike-intelligence pawns caught and imprisoned).

hideIfNoBloodfeeders.label: Hide if no bloodfeeders
hideIfNoBloodfeeders.description: If true, this mode is hidden when there are no bloodfeeder pawns in the colony.

hideOnHemogenicPawns.label: Hide on hemogenic pawns
hideOnHemogenicPawns.description: If true, this mode is hidden for pawns that have hemogen-related genes.

mustBeAwake.label: Must be awake
mustBeAwake.description: If true, this interaction mode is only available when the prisoner is awake.

allowInClassicIdeoMode.label: Allow in classic ideo mode
allowInClassicIdeoMode.description: If true, this mode remains available when ideology is running in classic (non-fluid) mode.

hideIfNotRecruitable.label: Hide if not recruitable
hideIfNotRecruitable.description: If true, this mode is hidden for prisoners that cannot be recruited.

hideIfNotStudiableAsPrisoner.label: Hide if not studiable as prisoner
hideIfNotStudiableAsPrisoner.description: If true, this mode is hidden when the prisoner is not eligible for anomaly study.

hideIfGrayFleshNotAppeared.label: Hide if gray flesh not appeared
hideIfGrayFleshNotAppeared.description: If true, this mode is hidden until the gray flesh anomaly event has occurred in the current game.

isNonExclusiveInteraction.label: Is non-exclusive interaction
isNonExclusiveInteraction.description: If true, this mode can be toggled alongside an exclusive prisoner interaction mode rather than replacing it.

isChildInteraction.label: Is child interaction
isChildInteraction.description: If true, this mode is treated as a child-specific prisoner interaction and is only shown for child pawns.

exclusive-prisoner-interaction.label: Exclusive prisoner interaction
exclusive-prisoner-interaction.description: Prisoner interaction mode that replaces other exclusive modes when selected.

non-exclusive-prisoner-interaction.label: Non-exclusive prisoner interaction
non-exclusive-prisoner-interaction.description: Prisoner interaction mode that can be toggled alongside an exclusive mode.
